V uses Donatella as internal example candidate
Careerspan serves job seekers but avoids burdening them financially
Business model focuses on helping employers leverage coaching data
Core product mechanism for extracting candidate narratives
AI coach powers the guided conversation experience
Conversations decompose into structured long-term profiles
AI decomposes stories into skills, contexts, outcomes, gaps components
Data is valuable leverage point for employer decision-making
